node.statement: (Recovery: Matrix Algebra → Classical Barvinok-Pataki). When A = M_n(C), the main theorem recovers the classical Barvinok-Pataki bound for complex SDP: an extreme point of {ρ ∈ S(M_n(C)) : Tr(a_j ρ) = β_j} has rank r satisfying r² ≤ m+1. The relationship to the standard formulation r² ≤ m (for the Hermitian PSD cone) is explained by the trace normalisation: the state space S(M_n(C)) already incorporates Tr(ρ)=1, which in the standard SDP formulation is counted among the m constraints.
